news.headline: TENN grows, expands funding to £1bn, launches new UK facility for mid-tier clients with varied asset portfolios.
news.summary: In London, a prominent capital provider for high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth individuals, TENN, is experiencing significant growth. They have expanded their funding mix to exceed £1 billion and have introduced a new capital facility tailored for the UK market. The decision to enter the UK market was primarily influenced by demand from their professional associates, aimed at catering to clients with moderate capital needs and diverse asset portfolios in the UK. TENN's reputation for superior service remains a driving force behind their expansion efforts.

news.headline: Barclays CEO discusses deregulation and trading performance on Bloomberg.
XCMG Crane delivers multiple overseas orders in 2025, strengthening global market presence.
news.summary: In Xuzhou, China, as of February 13, 2025, XCMG Crane, a prominent heavy machinery company, has successfully sent out a range of valuable equipment to overseas customers. This achievement has set a strong foundation for the year, showcasing the company's growing presence in the worldwide market. The exact number of equipment shipped and the total value of these shipments have not been disclosed.

news.headline: Global transportation management systems market to grow by USD 4.74 billion (2025-2029) at a CAGR of over 11.7%, driven by AI and smart-connected devices.
news.summary: In a recent report analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends, it was projected that the global transportation management systems market will see a significant increase in size, with an estimated growth of USD 4.74 billion between 2025 and 2029. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 11.7% during this period.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest GBP, CHF, EUR, CAD, NZD, JPY, AUD, USD - Weakest
Newronika secures €13.6M in Series B funding led by Fondazione ENEA Tech e Biomedical to advance adaptive DBS platform.
news.summary: In Milan on February 13, 2025, Newronika, a prominent company specializing in advanced deep brain stimulation, has revealed the completion of its Series B funding round, securing a total of €13.6 million. The investment was primarily supported by Fondazione ENEA Tech e Biomedical, a new investor in the company. This funding round marks a significant milestone for Newronika as it continues to innovate in the field of deep brain stimulation.

news.headline: ION Commodities partners with Avalara for tax compliance in energy trading; a global leader in energy management teams up with a cloud-based tax automation provider.
news.summary: In London on February 13, 2025, ION Commodities, a prominent company specializing in energy and commodity management solutions, revealed its collaboration with Avalara, a top provider of cloud-based tax compliance automation for companies worldwide. This strategic partnership aims to enhance services and support for businesses of varying scales.

news.headline: RED Digital introduces Z-mount versions of V-RAPTOR and KOMODO cameras, available for preorder at B&H.
news.summary: In a recent video news update, it was revealed that RED Digital Cinema is incorporating the Nikon Z-Mount into their V-RAPTOR and KOMODO cinema cameras. This development includes the introduction of Z-to-PL adapters equipped with drop-in ND filters. The announcement, made in New York on February 13, 2025, demonstrates RED's commitment to innovation in their products. The updated V-RAPTOR and KOMODO models are generating excitement among filmmakers and camera enthusiasts.

news.headline: Protocol launches mainnet to bypass intermediaries, aiming to reduce legal hassles for IP owners in a trillions-worth industry.
news.summary: The network's goal is to minimize legal obstacles for owners of intellectual property (IP) in order to access the vast multi-trillion-dollar industry.

news.headline: Latent Labs secures $50M funding to enhance AI-powered biology - led by Dr Simon Kohl from DeepMind; $40M included.
news.summary: A company known as Latent Labs, which focuses on developing AI foundation models for customizable biology applications, has recently revealed its emergence from stealth with a total of $50 million in funding. Dr. Simon Kohl, the founder of the company, formerly served as a co-lead on DeepMind's protein design team and as a key research scientist on DeepMind's AlphaFold2 project. This project was recognized with a Nobel Prize in Chemistry awarded to Demis Hassabis and John Jumper. The funding acquired includes a substantial $40 million injection.

news.headline: Toshiba showcases retail solutions at EuroCIS in Germany focused on secure, seamless, and personalized shopping experience.
news.summary: In Neuss, Germany, Toshiba will showcase its innovative solutions at EuroCIS that cater to secure, seamless, and personalized shopping experiences for attendees.

news.headline: VOOPOO VINCI Spark220 redefines vaping with advanced design. Aiming to bring cosmic beauty to users.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, the vaping industry is experiencing a period of stagnation, characterized by uninspired designs and predictable performance. Current devices are often described as relics of the past - bulky, unexciting, and lacking innovation. However, there is now a vision to transform vaping into something extraordinary - to embody the breathtaking beauty of the universe and place that marvel directly into the hands of consumers. Whether it be the SpaceX Starship blazing through the evening sky or the captivating allure of far-off galaxies, this initiative aims to infuse vaping with the constant drive and curiosity of humanity.

news.headline: Stora Enso's Annual Report for 2024 released on Feb. 13, 2025 at 9:30 EET. Visit storaenso.com/annualreport.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Stora Enso Oyj released its Annual Report and Remuneration Report for 2024 at 9:30 EET in Helsinki. The reports can be accessed at storaenso.com/annualreport. The Annual Report comprises a strategic report, corporate governance details, financial statements, and information on sustainability. This release provides shareholders and stakeholders with valuable insights into the company's performance over the past year. For more information, individuals can visit the designated website.

news.headline: Discover key guidelines for meme tokens, emphasizing community, security, and transparency to nurture successful meme economies. (Read More)
news.summary: Discover the key principles for meme tokens, with a particular emphasis on community development, safety, and openness, as per Linea's recommendations for cultivating prosperous meme markets. Explore further to gain valuable insights into enhancing the meme economy.

news.headline: German Defence Minister Pistorius: It would be naive to think the threat posed by Russia will subside even after any Ukraine peace agreement
Valmet's 2024 Financial Statements Review: Orders received rose, but Net sales and Comparable EBITA stayed stable.
news.summary: Valmet Oyj issued a stock exchange release at 9:00 a.m. EET on February 13, 2025, in ESPOO, Finland. In the period of October to December 2024, the company received new orders, with figures in brackets representing comparisons to the same period in the previous year.

news.headline: UK economy grows by 0.1%, offering relief to govt. amid efforts to boost investment and growth.
news.summary: The surprising uptick in growth alleviates strain on the administration, which has been aiming to boost investment and development efforts.

news.headline: German Defence Minister Pistorius: It would have been better if the US had not given concessions to Russia before negotiations
OKX Ventures supports Blum, a Telegram trading app in TON. Blum hits milestones with 90M users and strong DEX presence.
news.summary: OKX Ventures has made an investment in Blum, a cutting-edge trading application operating on the Telegram platform, aimed at bolstering the TON ecosystem. Blum has managed to reach important achievements, boasting a user base of 90 million and establishing a strong presence on decentralized exchanges (DEXs).

news.headline: Dow drops >200 points post inflation report, tech stocks lower. Greed Index in 'Fear' zone. Fastest monthly inflation since Aug 2023.
news.summary: Market sentiment took a hit as the CNN Money Fear and Greed index dropped into the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. The U.S. stocks saw a mixed day, with the Dow Jones index plummeting over 200 points following the inflation data release. The headline CPI surged by 3% year over year in January, exceeding both December's 2.9% figure and economist predictions of 2.9%. Monthly inflation also saw a spike of 0.5%, surpassing the expected 0.3% and accelerating from December's 0.4%. This represented the quickest monthly inflation rate since August 2023. Meanwhile, shares of major tech giants like Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) experienced a notable decline. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: AiMation Studios taps ElevenLabs AI to streamline character creation, saving costs and time. Industry groundbreaking work.
news.summary: AiMation Studios has implemented ElevenLabs' AI technology to transform character creation, leading to a remarkable reduction in costs and production time. By utilizing this innovative technology, the studio has become a trailblazer in the film industry, setting new standards for efficiency and creativity. This collaboration has resulted in substantial savings and a significant decrease in production time, making AiMation Studios a frontrunner in the industry's evolution.

news.headline: Manta Network's new dual-layer solution boosts speed and security for Layer 2 networks with MANTA token and Bitcoin integration.
news.summary: Manta Network has introduced a new strategy that addresses finality challenges in Layer 2 networks by utilizing a dual-layer system. This innovative approach aims to boost security and efficiency by integrating the MANTA token and Bitcoin. This move is significant as it addresses crucial issues within Layer 2 networks, marking a step forward in enhancing the overall functionality of such networks. The integration of these tokens is expected to provide a solid foundation for improved performance and security in the network. This development underscores the commitment to creating a more robust and reliable network infrastructure.

news.headline: XDENT LAB in Vietnam expands to become the largest Removable Denture factory, forecasting strong growth and introducing Lab-to-Lab services for the U.S. market.
news.summary: Vietnam's XDENT LAB, a prominent Removable Denture manufacturer, declared the expansion of its production facility in Ho Chi Minh City on Feb. 13, 2025. This development positions XDENT LAB as the largest facility of its kind in Vietnam. The company's decision to expand reflects its commitment to growth and meeting increasing demand.

news.headline: Valeura Energy reports record reserves and resources in 2024, with a 245% 2P reserves replacement ratio.
news.summary: In Singapore on February 13, 2025, Valeura Energy Inc. (TSX:VLE, OTCQX:VLERF) shared the outcomes of its recent assessment conducted by a third-party independent evaluator, reflecting the status of reserves and resources by the end of 2024.

news.headline: Deere & Co. expected to report $3.11 EPS and $7.70 billion revenue. Fastly, Inc. reports 4Q loss. Stocks on investor radar.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures are up this Thursday morning, with investor focus likely on specific stocks today:- Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of $3.11 per share on revenue of $7.70 billion before the market opens.- Deere shares saw a slight drop of 0.1% to $476 in after-hours trading.- Fastly, Inc. (NYSE:FSLY) reported a loss of 3 cents per share in the fourth quarter, a decrease from the 1 cent per share earnings in the same quarter of the previous year.- Further details on this news can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zebra Technologies will report Q4 earnings on Feb 13, 2025. Forecasted earnings at $3.94/share, revenue at $1.32 billion. Acquired Photoneo. Stock closed at $352.92.
news.summary: Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA) is set to unveil its fourth-quarter financial results on Feb. 13, 2025, prior to market opening. Analysts are anticipating quarterly earnings of $3.94 per share, a significant increase from the $1.71 per share reported in the same quarter last year. The company, headquartered in Lincolnshire, Illinois, is expecting to achieve quarterly revenue of $1.32 billion, up from $1.01 billion year-over-year. Recently, Zebra Technologies disclosed its intention to purchase Photoneo, a prominent developer and manufacturer of 3D machine vision solutions. The company's shares saw a slight decline of 0.4%, closing at $352.92 on the previous trading day. For more in-depth analysis and the latest analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform.

news.headline: Hanon Systems (KS:018880) included in S&P Global 2025 Sustainability Yearbook for second year, recognized as leading automotive supplier in Seoul.
news.summary: Hanon Systems, a prominent global automotive thermal management supplier based in Seoul, South Korea, has been recognized in the 2025 S&P Global Sustainability Yearbook for the second year in a row. The company's stock is listed as KS:018880. This year's edition of the S&P Global Sustainability Yearbook showcases various companies, highlighting their sustainability initiatives and achievements.

news.headline: Sivers Semiconductors partners with optical solutions leader for large-scale AI workloads. $4.3M program aims for high-volume production of laser arrays.
news.summary: A program costing $4.3 million will be dedicated to activities such as production qualification, high-volume manufacturing readiness, and the preparation of pre-production units for system testing and field trials. This initiative will take place in KISTA, Sweden, and involves Sivers Semiconductors AB (STO:SIVE), a renowned company specializing in photonics and wireless technologies.

news.headline: Annual General Meeting of Valmet Oyj on March 26, 2025 at 1:00 p.m. in Finland for shareholders.
news.summary: Valmet Oyj made a stock exchange release on February 13, 2025 at 9:05 a.m. EET in ESPOO, Finland. The notice is for shareholders of Valmet Oyj to attend the Annual General Meeting scheduled for March 26, 2025, starting at 1:00 p.m. (EET).

news.headline: Kojamo plc announces Annual General Meeting on March 13, 2025, in Helsinki. Shareholders invited to participate.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Kojamo plc announced their Annual General Meeting scheduled for March 13. Shareholders have been formally invited to participate in the event, which will be held in Helsinki. The meeting aims to address key matters pertaining to the company's operations and will commence at 9:00 a.m. EET.

US Defence Secretary Hegseth: Ultimately 5%/GDP as defense spending is critical.
Virtual Internet launches joint solution JioCinema and Virtual 5G Express Plus, targeting JioCinema users, increasing accessibility globally.
news.summary: In recent news from Singapore on February 13, 2025, Virtual Internet revealed the introduction of JioCinema and Virtual 5G Express Plus as a collaborative offering. This initiative targets JioCinema users and showcases a significant service that is now accessible worldwide due to Virtual 5G technology.

CMB.TECH to reveal Q4 2024 results on 27/02/2025, will hold conference call at 8am EST to discuss earnings.
news.summary: Antwerp-based company CMB.TECH NV (NYSE: CMBT & Euronext: CMBT) is set to unveil its financial performance for Q4 of 2024 on Thursday, February 27, 2025, before the market opens. Following this release, the Company will conduct a conference call at 8 a.m. EST / 2 p.m. CET on the same day to elaborate on the quarterly results. This announcement provides investors and stakeholders with insights into the Company's financial standing and strategic direction.

news.headline: Implantica receives positive feedback on RefluxStop™ submission from U.S. FDA for acid reflux with 1 billion sufferers.
news.summary: In Vaduz, Liechtenstein on February 13, 2025, Implantica AG (publ.), a leading medtech company specializing in innovative technology within the body, unveiled RefluxStop™, a distinct device designed to address acid reflux. The device is targeted towards a large market of 1 billion individuals experiencing acid reflux.

news.headline: Hyundai California Proving Ground reaches 20-year milestone, tests 5,000+ vehicles, 20M+ miles driven; commitment to innovation reaffirmed.
news.summary: Hyundai Motor Group recently reached a significant milestone, showcasing its dedication to safety, quality, design, and performance. Over 5,000 vehicles have undergone rigorous testing, covering a total distance of more than 20 million miles since the facility's establishment in 2005. To commemorate this achievement, a special 20-year celebratory event and reception took place on Monday, Feb. 10.

news.headline: Outokumpu decides not to invest in U.S. cold rolling expansion, focusing on market position. (Numbers: announced in 2023, strategy phase in 2026)
news.summary: Outokumpu Corporation announced on February 13, 2025, that the next strategy phase, set to begin in 2026, will prioritize enhancing the company's market position. This update follows a communication made on August 3, 2023, regarding the strategic direction. The announcement was made at 8.50 am EET in Helsinki.

news.headline: Siili Solutions Plc's Board established a matching share plan for key employees and a new performance period for the performance share plan.
news.summary: Siili Solutions Plc's Board introduced a matching share plan for key staff and approved a fresh performance period for the performance share plan.

news.headline: Outokumpu's 2024 results show full-year adjusted EBITDA of EUR 177M with low deliveries: 422,000 tonnes in Q4.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, stainless steel deliveries recorded at 422,000 tonnes, a decrease from the previous period's 450,000 tonnes. Adjusted EBITDA saw a significant decline to EUR -3 million from EUR 72 million. EBITDA also experienced a decrease to EUR -12 million compared to EUR 15 million. The Return on Capital Employed (ROCE) showed a slight improvement reaching -1.2% from -2.1%. Further, the free cash flow was not provided in the available information.

news.headline: Announcement for Siili Solutions Plc's AGM, date and details to be shared soon. Stay tuned! #AGM #SiiliSolutionsPlc
CVS Health expects 10% earnings growth by 2025 due to Aetna's recovery, projecting EPS of $5.75-$6 (10% rise from 2024's $5.42).
news.summary: CVS Health Corp. (NYSE:CVS) exceeded fourth-quarter earnings expectations and shared an optimistic outlook for fiscal year 2025 due to the anticipated revival of its insurance segment, particularly Aetna's progress. The company forecasted adjusted earnings per share for 2025 to be between $5.75 and $6, which represents a double-digit increase from its 2024 EPS of $5.42. CEO David Joyner highlighted the anticipated recovery in the Aetna business, especially in Medicare Advantage, and ongoing growth in Health Services. Aetna, under CVS Health, provides health insurance plans and services to various sectors.

news.headline: Applibot, Inc. is launching "Chiikawa Pocket" app in 43 countries in late March 2025, based on popular manga "Chiikawa."
news.summary: In Shibuya, Tokyo, on February 13, 2025, Applibot, Inc. announced the upcoming release of their new smartphone application "Chiikawa Pocket" globally in late March 2025. The app, based on the well-known manga series "Chiikawa" originally shared on X (formerly Twitter), will be available in 43 countries and regions. Koki Ukita serves as the President of Applibot, Inc., and is taking the lead in this international launch.
